description: Workflow for processing budgeting and forecasting entities in FinanceX Suite
name: financex_budget_forecasting_workflow

transitions.description: Submit budget entity and enqueue for processing
transitions.end_state_description: Budget entity has been queued for processing
transitions.name: submit_budget

transitions.description: Complete forecast processing and set results
transitions.end_state_description: Forecast processing has completed with results or error
transitions.name: complete_forecast

externalized_processors.description: Perform forecasting with AI model or defaults
externalized_processors.name: process_forecast
